title: Obamas host star-studded opening of Chicago presidential centre
description: The campus opens to the public this weekend with a museum, community amenities and more to honour the 44th US president.
content: Former President Barack Obama and former first lady Michelle Obama welcomed three former US presidents, dignitaries, celebrities and the public to the Obama Presidential Center on Thursday - an opening in the works in the decade since the 44th presid... [1731 chars]

title: US lifts naval blockade as Iran's supreme leader says Trump made deal 'out of desperation'
description: Iran's supreme leader says he disagrees with the deal and Donald Trump signed it "out of desperation".
content:
The US has dropped its naval blockade of Iran after the two countries signed a deal to end the war in the Middle East.
US Central Command confirmed the end of the blockade on X "in accordance with the President's direction", and said some US vessels ... [3876 chars]

title: Wolverhampton man involved in UK-France people smuggling jailed
description: A man helped smuggle people from the UK to France and boasted about the operation, a court hears.
content:
A people smuggler who boasted about transporting migrants from the UK to France in the back of lorries has been jailed.
Jaskirat Singh, 25, from Wolverhampton, said in a voice note he had been organising cross-Channel journeys over four years in an a... [1081 chars]

title: UK could keep special pre-Brexit terms if it rejoined EU, Michel Barnier says
description: Exclusive: Former chief Brexit negotiator says staying out of euro and Schengen area would be ‘perfectly possible’
content:
Michel Barnier has said Britain could regain its special terms if it rejoined the EU and claimed it was becoming clearer every day to the British people that they would be stronger in Europe.
In an interview before the 10th anniversary of the Brexit ... [4998 chars]

title: Another FTSE 100 firm falls to private equity. Where are the new listings?
description: You can’t complain Intertek’s £10bn takeover happened – the problem is the lack of arrivals in the other direction
content:
It would be a stretch to describe the £10bn-ish takeover of Intertek as a landmark event for the London stock market or the FTSE 100 index.
This is not an Arm Holdings moment – the purchase of that Cambridge chip designer by Japan’s SoftBank in 2016 ... [2801 chars]
